ground_truth.title: Skin Care Treatments
ground_truth.main_content:
Skin Care Services at Massage Envy: TAKE YOUR SKIN CARE GAME TO THE NEXT LEVEL. When your skin needs more specialized care, advanced skin care services can get you even closer to achieving your skin goals. You know your skin better than anyone, and we know skin care. Share your skin goals with your esthetician and together you can map out a personalized skin care journey to achieve them. Based on your specific skin concerns, they can suggest the appropriate mix of skin care services and products to add to your at-home routine. Your best skin awaits, so let's get glowing!

Advanced Skin Care Services:

Microderm Infusion: With each pass, an innovative diamond-tipped wand exfoliates, extracts debris, and infuses a choice of serums so you can show off brighter, smoother skin. With minimal downtime, it's the perfect way to get glowing before a special event!

Dermaplaning: You may have heard all the buzz surrounding dermaplaning and what it can do for your skin. GREAT NEWS: You can now experience it for yourself at participating Massage Envy franchised locations!

Chemical Peel: During your session, experienced estheticians utilize PCA SKIN advanced treatments for deep exfoliation, resulting in a refreshed, more radiant-looking you.

Zero Downtime Peel: This innovative peel offers no expected visible peeling or redness, so you can get glowing and get going! It's the perfect way to prep your skin for a special occasion.

We put the 'care' in skin care: The sheer volume of information available on the internet about skin care can be overwhelming. How do you know which trends are worth adopting and which you should skip? With a minimum of 500 hours of education and 20 hours of ongoing specialty training, the estheticians employed by franchised locations are skin-savvy, experienced professionals you can trust to guide you towards achieving your best skin.

Use the products the pros do: The skin care services offered at select Massage Envy franchised locations feature innovative, efficacious products from industry-leading skin care brands. Those same products are available for you to purchase and use at home, to keep you on track to achieving your skin goals. Featured products include Marini SkinSolutions C-ESTA Face Serum and PCA SKIN Smoothing Serum.

SKIN CARE THAT PUTS THE FOCUS WHERE IT BELONGS: ON YOU. The best skin care services aren't one-size-fits-all solutions... They're targeted to address your specific skin concerns and goals. Because your ME Time is all about YOU.
